plan.title: Headless swarm launch engine: task swarm:launch deterministic prep CLI

narratives.Description: Provides a deterministic task swarm:launch entry point that turns an operator-supplied, pre-approved cohort into a ready-to-spawn launch manifest. It resolves named stories, enforces the existing task swarm:readiness and #810 preflight gates, and pre-populates the #1378 allocation-context consent token so the monitor can spawn agents without re-running Phase 0 ceremony. This story owns only the launch engine and its Taskfile target, keeping it independently buildable against the frozen C2/C3 contracts.
narratives.ImplementationPlan:
1. Add scripts/swarm_launch.py implementing a CLI that resolves --stories (issue numbers) and explicit --paths against vbrief/active, then runs the #810 preflight gate (task vbrief:preflight) and task swarm:readiness per story, exiting nonzero and naming the first failing story.
2. Consume the frozen worktree-map schema (C3), generate per-agent dispatch envelopes that populate the #1378 allocation-context token, and emit a launch-manifest JSON (C2); register a swarm:launch target in tasks/swarm.yml forwarding CLI_ARGS bare.
3. Cover story resolution, gate-failure exit codes, and manifest shape with assertions in tests/cli/test_swarm_launch.py.
narratives.UserStory: As a swarm operator, I want a deterministic launch command for a pre-approved cohort, so that agents can be spawned without re-running Phase 0 ceremony.

narrative.Acceptance: When invoked with --stories 612,547,543,610, the command resolves each issue number to its vbrief/active story file and rejects any unresolved id with a nonzero exit.
When any named story has not passed task vbrief:preflight or task swarm:readiness, the command fails with a nonzero exit and names the failing story.
When all stories pass the gates, the command emits a launch-manifest JSON that records each agent's worktree path, branch, and populated allocation-context token.
When run with --autonomous, the command returns the manifest without prompting and records the batching rationale in each generated envelope.

references.title: Issue #1387: feat(swarm): low-ceremony / headless launch for pre-approved cohorts (build on #1378 allocation-context token)
